text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day before the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. My legs feel nice and light.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Seems like the regimen Trainer's put together is
doing me good. Probably.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I could do without all the damn nagging,
though.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, all that's left is a quick cooldown and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Scratch that. I think I'm overdue for a visit to my
favorite spot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(This place is always so peaceful... It never fails to
calm me down.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe 'cause no one's here. All people ever do
is make fun of me.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Short, spineless, and weak they'd say. Not a
single redeeming feature. Like I was practically
wearing a sign telling people to bully me.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(It doesn't even matter if I'm on the turf or not.
No one lets me just live my life.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Enough about that. They can go ahead and say
whatever they want.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'll make them eat their words once they see what
I'm capable of.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I should head home and take a break. I'll need the
rest so I can win tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (No... I will win. I have to.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(The only way I can get people to respect me is
through racing!)
Um, excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A voice suddenly calls out to Narita Taishin, and
she spins around in surprise.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're Narita Taishin, right? The one running in
all those races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A redheaded girl, as small as Narita Taishin,
stands before her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, what of it?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
The G1 race tomorrow... What's it called again?
The Satsuki Sho? You're running in it, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're still doing it even though the top two are
going to be there. And they're stronger and have
better physiques.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you? What are you getting at?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I'm just stating the obvious.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! No one's rooting for you! No
one thinks you can win!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make you want to give up? Most
people would...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not really?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No one's ever expected me to win. Not even
once.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I just want to make everyone regret how they've
treated me. Everyone else has a "dream" or
whatever, but me? Mine's practically revenge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But who cares? Even if I'm being driven by petty
revenge, why should I give up on my goal?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to see this through. I'm going to show
them what I can do. That's it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The red-haired girl bites her lip, glares at Narita
Taishin, and runs off. Her legs are wrapped tightly
in braces meant for sports.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win. I have to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit is burning fiercely.
She's ready.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Here I go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ticket! Let's see that amazing final dash of yours
today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide! I came to see you wiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear that, folks? Just the sight of them is
making the crowd go wild!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
This is it. Everyone at the Satsuki Sho has their
eyes on the showdown between the top two,
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to those idiots making a huge fuss over
nothing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll show them all what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling it too, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm all jittery and tingly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They call us the top two, but we know better than
anyone that that's not accurate.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! I'm not gonna lose! I'm gonna give it all
I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And thus begins the Satsuki Sho!
